history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. A safe path to the goal is to go downward through row 03 column B and then toward row 04 column C/D. To start that path, I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward now safely advances me toward the open path while avoiding the lava at column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward is a safe first step that brings me closer while avoiding the lava at column C row 03.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D. The safe path is along row 04 through column C to column D, but first I must face right. From facing down, turning left will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is a safe floor cell (`.`), and continuing through it leads toward the goal at row 04 column D. So the best next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D, which is directly in front of me and is safe. Moving forward will reach the goal immediately.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
